User.title: User Profile
User.description: User account information, SaaS subscription status, and free tier usage limit indicators.

uid.description: The unique Firebase Auth user ID.

freeUsesToday.description: Number of free tools utilized today (resets daily, max 3).

lastUsedDate.description: The date (YYYY-MM-DD) when the user last ran a tool.

UsageLog.title: Usage Log
UsageLog.description: Records individual tool usage executions for billing, usage metrics, and limiting.

SubscriptionTx.title: Subscription Transaction
SubscriptionTx.description: Record of mock payments and subscriptions purchased by SaaS users.

/users/{userId}.description: Information about each user, their billing status, and usage limit metrics.

/users/{userId}/usageLogs/{logId}.description: Detailed log history of documents processed by this specific user.

/transactions/{txId}.description: Global billing and transaction logs for administrators.
